_comment: Stage-2 stack A = Revit-direct / no-kg. CURRENT v1 build, KG_BENCH_MODE=flat => kg_* NOT registered; the Revit create/query commands (create_*, ai_element_filter, get_current_view_elements) ARE present. The agent must build for real in Revit and answer by querying the live model — steering forbids store_*_data (technically present in flat mode; any use is a documented deviation). 'command' is the ABSOLUTE conda 'revitmcp' node.exe. New profile dir => one-time Claude Code MCP approval + headless probe before any billable run.
